events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana, March 23 - April 7. Route: Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Planning activities and shopping for eyeglasses.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto, validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses, and finalize activity plans for Kyoto and Takayama.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses

events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago
events.context: Two-part trip: 1-2 night warm backpacking trip mid-March, then Chicago for Mariano's 30th birthday celebration on March 19th.
events.hook: Find a warm backpacking destination for March 14-15, book flights to the destination and from there to Chicago, arrange REI gear rentals, and consider a birthday gift for Mariano.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)
